query:
SELECT cg.id, cg.name, mi.name as item, COUNT(co.id) as active_opts
FROM menu_addon_groups cg
JOIN menu_items mi ON mi.id = cg.menuItemId
JOIN menu_addon_options co ON co.groupId = cg.id AND co.isActive = 1
WHERE cg.name LIKE '%Turbine%'
GROUP BY cg.id, cg.name, mi.name;
